output: Implemented batch 2 / T2 by making the shell and inspector read/write the shared interaction policy: `VideoEditorShell` now shows a phone mode bar, uses selection-aware inspector targets, and surfaces a quicker tablet inspector affordance in condensed layouts; `PropertiesPanel` and `ClipPanel` now expose inspector-first actions for trim, move, track moves, split, mute, delete, and precision so touch users do not have to rely on direct manipulation. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/create-a-concrete-mobile-and-20260410-0149/execution_batch_2.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Made shell and inspector affordances policy-driven without introducing a second mobile editor path. `VideoEditorShell` now reads the shared interaction policy, renders a persistent phone mode bar for `Browse`/`Select`/`Move`/`Trim` plus a `Precision` toggle, keeps the inspector target in sync with selection, and surfaces a selection-aware inspector affordance in condensed tablet layouts that can jump directly to properties. `PropertiesPanel` and `ClipPanel` now provide explicit inspector-first controls for trim, move, move-to-track via track up/down, split, mute, delete, and precision so common touch edits do not depend on fragile direct manipulation. Verified with `npm exec vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` and `npm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Phone layouts now expose a persistent mode bar and inspector button that both route through the shared interaction policy, while touch-oriented inspector action groups in `PropertiesPanel` and `ClipPanel` make trim, move, track moves, split, mute, delete, and precision visible without relying on direct timeline manipulation. Condensed tablet layouts also surface a selection-aware `Clip`/`Selection` inspector affordance and auto-open the properties side when a selection is present, so access is faster than relying on the preview/properties toggle alone.
